name: 异常通知联系人表单同步-拉取GitHub仓库更新CSV

parameters.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
REPO_URL="git@github.com:chenjiuxuan1/KN-YCGJ-TZ.git"
REPO_DIR="/data/KN-YCGJ-TZ"
CSV_PATH="/data/KN-YCGJ-TZ/alert-sql-notification/data/alert-contact-mapping.csv"
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPO_DIR")"
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then
  cd "$REPO_DIR"
  git fetch origin main
  git checkout main
  git pull --rebase origin main
else
  git clone "$REPO_URL" "$REPO_DIR"
  cd "$REPO_DIR"
  git checkout main
fi
test -f "$CSV_PATH"
echo "repo=$REPO_DIR"
echo "csv=$CSV_PATH"
'

nodes.name: Pull GitHub Repo
nodes.notes: n8n 本机需要安装 git，并配置可读写 git@github.com:chenjiuxuan1/KN-YCGJ-TZ.git 的 SSH key。仓库会放在 /data/KN-YCGJ-TZ。

nodes.name: Update Repo Contact CSV
nodes.notes: 需要 n8n 环境变量 NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs。只覆盖仓库内单个 CSV 文件。

parameters.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
REPO_DIR="/data/KN-YCGJ-TZ"
cd "$REPO_DIR"
git config user.name "n8n-contact-sync"
git config user.email "n8n-contact-sync@kn.group"
git add "alert-sql-notification/data/alert-contact-mapping.csv"
if git diff --cached --quiet; then
  echo "no changes to commit"
  exit 0
fi
git commit -m "chore: sync alert contact mapping from form"
git push origin main
'

nodes.name: Commit And Push CSV
nodes.notes: 只有 CSV 有变更时才会提交并推送到 GitHub main 分支。
